game.instructions: Place exactly one crown in each row, column, and colored region. Crowns can't touch, even diagonally.
game.recorded: Awesome! Your time is on the leaderboard.
game.autoFillDesc: Automatically places X marks around each crown you place.

cookies.title: Quick Cookie Question
cookies.description: Can we remember your language, theme, and game settings (like Auto-X)? It'll save you from setting it up every time.
cookies.essential: We'll only store the basics then.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.generateDesc: If there's no board yet, you can manually generate one here.
